titleStmt.title: SII 41.387: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 387. (A.R. No. 602 of 1905.) Tiṅgaḷūr, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Chandramaulīśvara temple at Tiṅgaḷūr.

summary.p: Built in the end. Seems to be an undertaking given by the trustees of the temple to two officials that they would conduct all the stipulated services in the temple using the income from the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam, etc. as per the old documents.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . viracomiśvaratevar pradhivirājyampaṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa śubhānu varuṣattu māci mātam 9 tināḷ kuṟuppu nāṭṭut tiṅkaḷūril m meṟpaṭi va Build in.
ciṟunāyaṉ cuntarapperumāḷukkum mutaliyāṉataṭṭuruva viṭṭa cuntarapāṇṭiyac cakkaravattikaḷukkumnāṅkaḷ cātaṉa paṇṇi kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Iṉṉāyaṉār śrīpaṇṭāramāy mutalāṉa tevar teraiyūrāṉa I
maṭaiviḷākattiṟ kuṭi Iṟukku mutaluḷḷatum tāmaraikkuḷattil vāramuṉ to kūṟum tiruccurapi mutalum nāyanār veḷḷāṇmai mutalum tirumalaiyil muṉṉāḷilāṉa kalveṭṭuppaṭikku Ūr tirukaṇ
Oṉṟu ney Uḻakkum maṭavāri maṟṟuminta ṉāyanār mutaluḷḷavai Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum kaikkoṇṭu Uṭaiyāṟku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭikku Arici kāṇi munāḻiyum mu ku Amutupaṭikku Arici nāḻiyum Āka Arici
nuntāviḷakku Iraṇṭum naṭatti nimantak kaṭṭukku nampimār Oṉṟu tevakaṉmi Oṉṟu māṇ Iraṇṭum Ukaccu Oṉṟum naṭṭuvam Uṭukkai mattāḷam pāṭṭum Ōtuvāril kāṇiyāṭṭikaḷāyuḷḷavarka
potuvāṉataiyum Immutalile Iṭṭu naṭatta civappirāmaṇa kāṇiyāṭcikku muṭaimaikkāṇattā
ṟ panṉiniru kalamu kāṇiyum paṇam paṉṉiraṇṭum peṟṟu Ukaccakkāṇi kkum paṭima mai kuṭuttu naṭatti viBuild in.
Digital edition of SII 41.387 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
